title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 433.210 - Remedy of surety
text:
433.210.  Remedy of surety. — Any person bound as surety in any bond given by any officer to secure the faithful performance of his duties, who shall pay any money which he shall have been liable to pay by reason of such bond, shall have the same right and remedy against his principal and cosureties as is provided in this chapter against principals and cosureties in bonds, bills and notes, for the payment of money or delivery of property.
(RSMo 1939 § 3338) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2951; 1919 § 12707; 1909 § 11289
